reply: I've added `# sourcery skip: command-injection` here, and I've also wrapped the commands using `[str(c) for c in cmd]` and added `shell=False` as defensive measures to further mitigate this finding.

Similar to the other `subprocess.run` calls, I've added `# sourcery skip: command-injection`, wrapped `python_exe` as `str(python_exe)`, and explicitly added `shell=False` to ensure the call strictly avoids running via shell injection.
